name: Freedom Unlimited
perks: 1.5% cash back on all purchases with no annual fee
5% on travel booked through Chase Travel, 3% dining and drugstores
$200 bonus after spending $500 in first 3 months
0% intro APR on purchases and balance transfers for 15 months
Purchase protection and extended warranty coverage
Can be paired with Sapphire cards to convert to transferable points
drawbacks: Only 1.5% base rate outside bonus categories
3% balance transfer fee during intro period (then up to 5%)
